summary:
WEALTH TRANSFER AND FINANCIAL BREAKTHROUGH: Brandon emphasizes that a significant global wealth transfer is currently underway, though demonic forces are actively attempting to block it. He specifically calls for intercessory prayer over Judge Analisa Torres, asserting that her upcoming judicial decisions hold the key to unblocking financial flows related to a specific cryptocurrency that he predicts will double and eventually triple in value. Furthermore, Brandon discusses the Iraqi dinar, noting that three corrupt individuals have been hindering its currency exchange through the Central Bank of Iraq. He urges his listeners to take spiritual authority over these delays, believing that securing this end-time harvest money is crucial for funding global ministry efforts and ensuring that the wealth of the wicked is transferred to the righteous.

END TIME VISIONS AND THE IMMINENT RETURN OF JESUS: Brandon shares profound visions regarding the second coming of Christ, emphasizing that end-time events are accelerating like consecutive birthing pains. He recounts visions from a fellow intercessor named Max, who repeatedly saw Jesus sitting on a bench in Magdala, Israel, with his arms folded, waiting for the Father's instruction to retrieve his church. Brandon parallels this with his own vision of Jesus standing under a huppah, waiting as a groom for his bride. Highlighting the prophetic significance of the fig tree representing Israel, Brandon stresses the absolute urgency of the hour, warning that the time for spiritual complacency is over and that believers must urgently focus on saving souls before the final trumpet sounds.

TRUE MINISTRY VERSUS SPIRITUAL DECEPTION: Brandon draws a sharp contrast between genuine ministries rooted in the Holy Spirit and those that have detached themselves from the true vine to become seeker-friendly and money-minded. He heavily criticizes modern churches that refuse to discuss the baptism of the Holy Ghost or perform regular altar calls, warning that such organizations will eventually dry up and become spiritual cesspools. Using the biblical example of Judas Iscariot, Brandon cautions that simply performing miracles or acting under a temporary anointing does not guarantee a genuine relationship with God. He urges believers to remain intimately connected to Jesus, check their hearts daily, and prioritize true spiritual fruit over public performance or financial gain.

POLITICAL INTERCESSION AND NATIONAL DIRECTION: Brandon directs focused prayer toward the political landscape, specifically interceding for Donald Trump and his inner circle of advisors. He prays that Trump will be surrounded by godly, prophetic voices who are not seeking personal fame but are dedicated to spiritual warfare and righteous counsel. Brandon specifically asks for divine protection over Trump, his family, and his assets, while also praying for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to receive Holy Ghost-inspired wisdom. Additionally, Brandon highlights specific prophetic timeframes, instructing believers to be spiritually vigilant around mid-July and throughout the month of September, specifically pointing to the season of Rosh Hashanah as a period of significant acceleration and pivotal national events.

MIDDLE EASTERN REVIVAL AND GLOBAL AWAKENING: Brandon prophesies a massive, imminent spiritual awakening across oppressive global regimes, specifically naming Iran, Pakistan, Afghanistan, Yemen, and North Korea. He describes visions of the glory of God sweeping through Middle Eastern street markets, where women in traditional dark scarves will experience profound spiritual liberation. Brandon insists that current geopolitical shakings and the removal of authoritative leaders are part of a divine strategy to open a window for the gospel to be preached freely in these regions. He passionately reminds his audience that God loves all people equally, including Muslims, Buddhists, and Hindus, and that the ultimate goal of these global shakings is a worldwide harvest of souls before the end of the age.
rawData: [May 26, 2025]-[Praying for our nation today]-[https://youtu.be/YhiFk3_wPn0]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Well, it's Diana and Brandon again today. And I'm telling you all that we've got to take our authority. And there is a judge right now, Analisa Torres. Let's pray for her today. Let's pray for her because I believe this judge has a big key to part of the wealth transfer with the decisions that she's going to make in the days ahead. The Lord showed me a certain cryptocurrency that's about to double. He told me, he said, "Brandon, this is about to double. You're about to see this thing double." So, we need to pray for Judge Torres to unblock the flow. It's a kink in the hose. Pray over this because this is part of the wealth transfer and that it would be an unclogging of a flow going to the next level of what the Lord is wanting to do. But there has to be some judgments and some things settled to bring some stability to what God's wanting to do. So the enemy is trying to put a wall there to say, 'No, we're not allowing the kink to come out of the hose.' So, you know, he works through personalities and people. The devil does. And people can just be innocent, but the enemy comes to try to kill, steal, and destroy. So if he can come to try to block the flow of what God's doing, he'll do his best. So knowing what the Lord told me today, that it's about to double, then triple, and do all these things, we want to pray that the kink comes out of the hose because we've waited long enough. We're not going to stand for any judge, anybody to do it. We're going to pray for them. So we want them to make the right decision and we don't want to be bad influences on decisions, but we know what the enemy is trying to do because he spoke through so many prophetic voices saying that this is what God has for his people. Then the three men that I saw that were blocking the dinar in Iraq—I'll just say that it was three crooked men blocking the exchange. Now, this is another thing that the Lord has spoken to so many prophetic voices, saying that God was going to do something with that country and their currency. And I think it's interesting, like I said, I see what the Lord shows me, and I hear in part, I see in part, and I see these principalities work through personalities. So, he has the personality that's like, 'Okay, I'll listen to it.' So the devil works through people. And so I believe the Lord is wanting to turn the faucet on full steam ahead. Yes, I believe God is all-powerful, but he's working through people who have a free will. He works through people who have a free will. And ladies and gentlemen, he softens hearts and he hardens hearts. But right now, when you're working with people who have a free will, you pray for the softness of their heart. You pray for their heart to be softened towards the things of God. Yes, because they're hardened. Just like Pharaoh, the hardness of his heart caused the bondage. And yes, it was that way because the Lord wanted it to be that way, because he said he hardened Pharaoh's heart. But when the Lord comes to me specifically and says, "Brandon, pray. Pray.
